title: FIFA Clarifies Stadium Water Bottle Policy After Backlash
excerpt: Following widespread criticism, FIFA has clarified its policy on water bottles and personal hydration at stadiums for the 2026 World Cup, ensuring fans stay hydrated in the summer heat across 16 host cities.
content:
## FIFA Addresses Hydration Concerns

Following a social media firestorm and backlash from fan groups, FIFA has officially clarified its stadium water bottle policy for the 2026 World Cup. The controversy erupted after initial reports suggested fans would be prohibited from bringing sealed water bottles into venues — a policy that would have been especially problematic given the tournament is being held across North America in June and July.

## The Clarification

In a statement released Monday, FIFA confirmed that fans **will** be permitted to bring one sealed 500ml plastic water bottle per person into all 16 stadiums. Additionally, free water refill stations will be installed at every venue, with a minimum of one station per 500 spectators.

"The health and safety of all fans is our top priority," the statement read. "After consultation with venue operators and medical experts across the United States, Canada, and Mexico, we have updated our policy to ensure adequate hydration access while maintaining security protocols."

## VIP Considerations

For VIP guests booking luxury hospitality packages, hydration is never a concern. Presidential suites and skybox lounges include unlimited premium bottled water, electrolyte beverages, and chilled champagne throughout every match. Our concierge team ensures all client preferences are met, from specific water brands to custom hydration plans.

## Looking Ahead

With summer temperatures often exceeding 95°F (35°C) in Dallas, Houston, and Atlanta during June and July, the hydration policy remains a critical issue. FIFA has pledged to review venue-specific heat management plans and communicate any further updates 30 days before kickoff.

At Vantage 26, we recommend all clients — whether in general seating or VIP suites — arrive hydrated and take advantage of the refill stations available. For VIP package holders, simply notify your personal concierge and we'll ensure your preferences are covered.
